# docs — project documentation

## Source of truth & reference (given)
- `business/Ignatev_Estate_Business_and_Operating_Model_v3.md` — the operating model.
- `business/positioning.md` — what myUNO is and how it wins.
- `business/user_journey_audit.md` — the coverage checklist: every role's journey and every flow. Fable verifies its flows cover this; gaps go to `open_questions.md`.
- `brand/brand_direction.md` (+ boards) — brand and art direction.

## Generated by Fable (in order) — see `../START_HERE_FABLE.md`
